triage_rows.detail: Use the mild-blocked broader-hit lane as the only wider reference and supervise it before any additional surface growth.
The branch is still not authorized to jump to all-session expansion.
Phase-2 shadow progress still does not authorize replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34T converts the updated phase-2 shadow stack into the current direction judgment.
The branch now has a current narrow reference and a current wider reference; no further widening is justified until the refined wider lane itself is supervised more deeply.
